Box #12—Change the Intensity of the Interaction
v1.01 (c) Deutsch & Associates, Inc Published by Marketing Rebel LLC
Idea Power by David L. Deutsch
MarketingRebelClub.com/marketing-rebel-courses/idea-power/
Idea Power / Idea Power Adventures / Adventure #6—Box #12 Change the Intensity of the Interaction
*What might you do to make the interaction even more intense?
Go ahead and stir things up. You never know what may happen. How might you say, write or
do something unexpected! Or perhaps you can add emotion to increase the intensity? Let
yourself go. You don’t have to actually use what you come up with. But thinking about it may
lead to some interesting insights.
*How might it help to make the interaction less intense?
Sometimes, calmness is called for. For example, when everyone around you is shouting,
you’ll stand out if you whisper. The same is often true in speaking, in writing, or in advertising.
*What might you do to make the interaction even more intense?
Go ahead and stir things up. You never know what may happen. How might you say, write or
do something unexpected! Or perhaps you can add emotion to increase the intensity? Let
yourself go. You don’t have to actually use what you come up with. But thinking about it may
lead to some interesting insights.
